mapper.sql: select item_id, course_id, default_catalog_id, latest_version_id, current_version_no, question_type, difficulty_level, source_type, source_ref_id, source_batch_no, creator_user_id, status from sc_question_item
mapper.insert: insert into sc_question_item(course_id, default_catalog_id, latest_version_id, current_version_no, question_type, difficulty_level, source_type, source_ref_id, source_batch_no, creator_user_id, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{courseId}, #{defaultCatalogId}, #{latestVersionId}, #{currentVersionNo}, #{questionType}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{sourceBatchNo}, #{creatorUserId}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
